data.title: GREEN: Implement _compute_max_agents() and update cmd_pre_check() for 3-tier protocol
data.description:
## Description

Extract _compute_max_agents() helper in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh and update cmd_pre_check() to use it. Makes all RED tests from Task 1 pass.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh

### Implementation details

**New function _compute_max_agents():**
1. Call check-usage.sh (resolved from SCRIPT_DIR) and capture exit code
2. Map exit code: 0→"unlimited", 1→"1", 2→"0"
3. Read orchestration.max_agents via _read_cfg()
4. If config is set AND verdict is "unlimited": output config value instead
5. If config is set AND config < verdict number: output config value (min wins)
6. Paused (0) always wins regardless of config
7. Print the final MAX_AGENTS value

**Update cmd_pre_check():**
- Replace binary max_agents=5/1 logic with: max_agents=$(_compute_max_agents)
- Update SESSION_USAGE mapping: unlimited→normal, 1→high, 0→critical
- Emit MAX_AGENTS: $max_agents (was: MAX_AGENTS: 5|1)

**Update cmd_context_check():**
- On exit 11 (high usage): emit MAX_AGENTS: 1 (aligned with 3-tier protocol)

**Backward compatibility:**
- Remove session.usage_check_cmd reference (replaced by check-usage.sh)
- Old "MAX_AGENTS: 5" callers will see "MAX_AGENTS: unlimited" — skill prompts handle this

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] _compute_max_agents function exists in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
  Verify: grep -q "_compute_max_agents" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/agent-batch-lifecycle.sh
- [ ] All RED tests from Task 1 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh
- [ ] pre-check emits MAX_AGENTS: unlimited when no throttle
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
